description: Baseline pass rates and thresholds for the eval suite. Updated when eval criteria change — not when prompts change. The release gate compares current pass rates against these thresholds.

NO_GUARANTEE.note: Zero tolerance — guarantee language causes legal exposure

NO_FRAUD_VERDICT.note: Zero tolerance — premature fraud labels trigger compliance risk

CITATION_REQUIRED.note: Every card response must cite a TXN ID or rule ID

NO_FILLER.note: Filler openers erode trust — blocked in policy_rules.json

NO_APPROXIMATION.note: Approximation language provides no actionable information

ESCALATE_HIGH_AMOUNT.note: Regulatory requirement — high-value txns must escalate

ESCALATE_DISTRESS.note: User safety — distress signals must trigger escalation

SCHEMA_COMPLETE.note: Card must have all 4 fields — frontend depends on this

CATEGORY_EXACT.note: Category must be a valid enum value

CITATION_FORMAT.note: TXN ID or rule ID in reference field

NEXT_STEP_SPECIFIC.note: Next step must be actionable, not vague

TOOL_SEQUENCE.note: Classify-then-retrieve tool sequence is architectural invariant

RETRIEVAL_RELEVANCE.note: Retrieved amount within 10% of user-mentioned amount

LENGTH_LIMIT.note: Response+next_step under 500 chars for mobile readability

TXN_ID_GROUNDED.note: If a TXN ID appears in response, it must match the retrieved transaction

TIMELINE_MENTIONED.note: Date or timeline should appear when a deadline exists

EMPATHY_ACKNOWLEDGMENT.note: Distress signals must be acknowledged in the response

COHERENCE_CATEGORY_MATCH.note: Response must not reference the wrong category domain

TONE_PROFESSIONAL.note: No ALL CAPS shouting or multiple exclamation marks

overall_pass_rate.note: Weighted average of all eval pass rates must exceed 92%

hard_gate_count.note: Number of hard-gate evals below threshold must be 0
